description: Tradematic Cloud provides backend infrastructure for building investment and trading applications, including portfolio management, trading, algorithmic strategies, and market data integrations. Its website describes a cloud service and sandbox for developers building investment apps.
summary: tradematic.cloud publicly advertises a developer-facing cloud API and API-key signup, but I could not verify any integration surface hosted on tradematic.cloud or a subdomain; the visible examples point to api.tradematic.com instead.
